parameters: This is the "Room You Can't Leave Without Having Sex".

All abilities are sealed within this room, making it
impossible to escape by force.

However, it's a dream-like event (test run) that
allows you to deepen your bonds with your travel
companions even further!

Sensors throughout the room monitor 24/7, strictly
judging whether sex has occurred. (Pretending won't
open the door.)
Now, please do your best to engage in sex!

events.name: セックス部屋初回イベ

parameters: This is the "Room You Can't Leave Without Having Sex".

All abilities are sealed in this room, so you can't
escape by force.

But it's a dream-like event where you can deepen your
bonds with your travel companions even further!

Sensors in the room monitor 24/7, strictly judging
whether sex has occurred. (Pretending won't open the
door.)
Now, please do your best to engage in sex!
Se... seriously... Eh~~~...!? You're kidding, right!?
(For real... no... but... isn't this a chance!?)

L... let's first see if there's any way to escape by
checking around the room...

Looking inside the drawer, there are various
contraceptives like condoms and birth control pills...
(Found it...! Birth control pills... with these...)

I peeked inside... I can see the chimney hole at the
back of the fireplace, but it's very narrow.
Sigh... It seems impossible to get out from here.

This bed is so pretty and fluffy~ If I could take it
home, I would.

The bed we're using now is more than enough. It's
something you made for me, after all♪
A bath...! They even have something like this here...

Since we got stranded, I've only been able to wash
with water... I really want to take a proper bath~
It might be hard to escape by force...

For now... can I take a bath? I want to soak in the
tub for the first time in a while.
Then, I'll go in after you're done, Mom.

After that... we managed to escape from the "Room You
Can't Leave Without Having Sex" safely...

True to the room's concept, the bond between me and
Mom grew even stronger...

A nighttime event option "I Want to Have Sex" has been
added!
It might be hard to escape by force...

For now...can I take a bath? I want to soak in the tub
for the first time in a while.
Then, I'll go in after you're done, Mom.

After that...we managed to escape from the "Room You
Can't Leave Without Having Sex" safely...

True to the room's concept, the bond between me and my
mom grew even stronger...
